overall.description: A cinematic aerial drone shot through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring heavy traffic on multi-level highways and massive holographic koi fish swimming between neon-lit skyscrapers. The footage appears to be from a high-end video game with stunning visual quality and atmospheric neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway overlooking futuristic city center

agents.ego_description: aerial drone flying forward at high altitude over the elevated highway, observing the dense traffic flow below

entered.detail: multi-lane elevated highway with heavy traffic flowing in both directions, marked with yellow lane dividers
dense cluster of futuristic glass and steel skyscrapers with illuminated windows forming the city skyline
massive blue and white holographic koi fish swimming in the air between the downtown towers
large orange and gold holographic koi fish swimming alongside the blue one in the distance
tall vertical digital billboard displaying advertisements on the right side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a high aerial view of a busy elevated highway cutting through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. Heavy traffic moves along the multi-lane road while massive holographic koi fish swim in the distance between the illuminated skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level highway interchange with holographic displays

events.description: camera descends from high aerial view into the urban canyon, revealing the complex multi-level highway interchange and bringing the holographic fish into prominent view

agents.ego_description: drone descending into the urban canyon and navigating forward through the city, flying between skyscrapers and around the massive holographic fish projections

entered.detail: complex multi-level highway system with ramps, overpasses, and multiple road levels visible
elevated transit track or walkway running parallel to the highway on the left side

segments.scene_description: The camera descends into the urban canyon, revealing the intricate multi-level highway interchange below. The massive holographic koi fish now dominate the view, swimming gracefully between the neon-lit skyscrapers as the drone navigates through the dense urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial descent from a wide city vista into the heart of a neon-lit urban canyon. It begins with a high-altitude view of a busy elevated highway cutting through a futuristic cyberpunk city, where heavy traffic flows beneath the distant silhouettes of massive holographic koi fish. As the camera descends, the perspective shifts to reveal the intricate complexity of a multi-level highway interchange unfolding below. The scene then tightens as the drone navigates deeper into the dense environment, allowing the graceful holographic koi to dominate the view as they swim between towering, illuminated skyscrapers.
